objective: Build the operator console web interface (HTML/CSS/JS) served at /operator so operators can view, manage, and act on durable jobs, relay nodes, and system health without reading raw state files.

operator_static_files: companion/operator/index.html — single-page operator dashboard with four panels (Dashboard, Jobs, Relay Nodes, Enqueue)
companion/operator/styles.css — dark theme with CSS custom properties, status colors, responsive Grid layout
companion/operator/app.js — all client-side logic: fetch wrappers, panel rendering, event handlers, keyboard shortcuts, auto-refresh, confirmation dialogs, ARIA accessibility
server_routes: Follows existing console pattern (readFile from operator/ directory)
tests: scripts/test-operator-console.js (34/34 — covers /operator/ HTML, /operator/styles.css CSS, /operator/app.js JS, /health jobTotals, /relay/nodes, job mutation endpoints, /operator/missing 404, /jobs/:id 404)

results: GET /operator returns HTML page (200, text/html, contains dashboard structure)
GET /operator/styles.css returns CSS (200, text/css, contains CSS variables)
GET /health still returns jobTotals by status (unchanged)
Job mutation endpoints still work: cancel, retry, review
Existing tests pass: 117+64+44+85 tests across all job store/api/worker/mutation suites

passed: GET /operator returns the operator console HTML page (200, text/html)
GET /operator/styles.css returns CSS (200, text/css)
GET /operator/app.js returns JavaScript (200, application/javascript)
The operator console shows job counts by status on load (from /health jobTotals)
The jobs panel lists jobs with optional status filtering
Clicking a job row shows full metadata including attempt count, timestamps, lease info, result/error, planned/actual node, fallback reason, review metadata
Cancel button appears for queued/claimed jobs and successfully cancels via POST /jobs/:id/cancel
Retry button appears for failed jobs with remaining attempts and successfully retries via POST /jobs/:id/retry
Request Review button appears for running jobs and transitions to paused_review via POST /jobs/:id/review
Approve/Reject/Request Correction/Stop buttons appear for paused_review jobs and work correctly
Review actions include confirmation prompt and optional reason input
The nodes panel shows relay node list with health status and last heartbeat
The enqueue form creates jobs via POST /jobs
Loading, empty, and error states are handled with visible messages
All interactive elements have ARIA labels and are keyboard-navigable
Keyboard shortcuts work (r, 1-4, Escape)
Dashboard auto-refreshes every 10 seconds
node scripts/test-operator-console.js passes all test cases (34/34)

Existing tests still pass: node scripts/test-jobs-mutation.js (85/85), node scripts/test-jobs-api.js (64/64), node scripts/test-jobs-worker.js (44/44), node scripts/test-durable-job-store.js (117/117), node scripts/contract-test.js
/health response and all job API responses are unchanged
No changes to existing endpoint response envelopes

scope_notes: CLI commands for cancel/retry/review not included
Modifying the existing /console UI or its endpoints not included
Adding new API endpoints not included (only static file serving added)
Modifying companion/core/durable-job-store.js or any store logic not included
Modifying existing /tasks/run, /tracks/run, /workflows/run, /analyze response envelope shapes not included
No cross-process workers, worker pools, or separate Node.js processes
stop_conditions_honored: No modifications to existing endpoint response envelopes
No modifications to existing /console UI or its endpoints
last_fresh_validation: 2026-07-12 (operator console UI implemented and tested — 34/34; all 310 existing job/store/worker/mutation tests pass)
next_milestones: CLI commands for cancel/retry/review; broader operator control plane features
